name: Iterators.Generators.Containers.Keyed
code:
generic
   with package Keyed_Iterators is new Iterators.Keyed
     (Unkeyed => Iterators.Generators.Containers.Root,
      others  => <>);
   with package Containers is new Traits.Containers
     (Element_Type => Iterators.Generators.Containers.Root.Any_Element,
      others       => <>);
   with package Keyed_Containers is new Containers.Keyed
     (Keys   => Keyed_Iterators.Keys,
      others => <>);
package Iterators.Generators.Containers.Keyed

subprograms.name: Const_Iter
subprograms.code: function Const_Iter (C : aliased Container) return Iterator'Class

subprograms.name: Iter
subprograms.code: function Iter (C : aliased in out Container) return Iterator'Class

formals.name: Containers
Keyed_Containers
Keyed_Iterators
